$description: Triggering eval set for the cinematic-scroll skill. Each case is a user query and whether the skill SHOULD activate. Run with an LLM judge (e.g. skill-creator run_loop) against the frontmatter description: recall = positives that fire; precision = near-miss negatives that correctly DON'T. Negatives are deliberate look-alikes that share keywords (scroll, 3D, page) but are out of scope.

cases.query: Build me a scroll-driven product launch page with pinned chapters
I want a cinematic hero with multi-layer parallax as you scroll
Make a Shopify-Editions-style release site for our new product
An editorial microsite where the background morphs between scenes on scroll
Add 3D tilt cards that react to the cursor
A scroll-scrubbed video hero like the Apple AirPods page
Kinetic headline that reveals word-by-word as it enters view
Give me an awwwards-tier scroll experience for our brand story
A depth-parallax storytelling page with chaptered reveals
Audit and score the scroll experience of my own landing page at this URL
Build a hover dropdown navigation menu
Write a print stylesheet for our invoices
Make a multiplayer Three.js browser game
Set up a static markdown blog
Build a CRUD admin dashboard with tables and filters
Add a contact form with validation and email sending
Create a REST API endpoint for user signup
Style a sortable data table
Audit competitor example.com (a site I don't own) and scrape its layout
Implement an e-commerce checkout flow with Stripe
